primary_sources.notes: Standalone revenue ~₹155,000 Cr. Employee costs ~₹18,000 Cr (11.6%), Material ~₹95,000 Cr (61%). Diversified auto + farm equipment + financial services + IT (Tech Mahindra).

primary_sources.source_name: Aditya Birla Group — Hindalco + Grasim + UltraTech FY25 BRSR disclosures
primary_sources.notes: Conglomerate cost structure: metals (Hindalco), cement (UltraTech), chemicals (Grasim), financial services. Segment-wise cost disclosed in BRSR filings.
Revenue ~₹938,000 Cr. O2C segment (dominant), telecom (Jio), retail (Reliance Retail), media. Employee ~3-4% of consolidated revenue. Cross-segment shared services.

primary_sources.source_name: SEBI BRSR Core Reporting Framework 2023 (Business Responsibility and Sustainability Report)
primary_sources.notes: Mandatory BRSR Core disclosure for top 1000 listed entities. Standardised cost and sustainability metrics enabling cross-conglomerate comparison.

source_metadata.methodology: Conglomerates are by definition diversified, making single-sector benchmarks imprecise. P25/P50/P75 represent weighted-average operating cost ratios across diversified business mixes. Benchmark uses SEBI BRSR disclosures + annual report segment data for 3 major Indian conglomerates. Note: individual business units should be benchmarked against sector-specific packs, not this aggregate.

HR.source_note: Consolidated employee cost % of revenue. M&M FY25: 11.6%, Reliance FY25: ~3-4% (O2C-heavy lowers ratio), Aditya Birla Group: 8-15% depending on segment mix. Range reflects business mix: O2C/commodities lowers ratio, services/tech raises it.

OUTSOURCED.source_note: Material, manufacturing, and outsourced services combined. M&M FY25: material + manufacturing ~65%. Commodity-heavy conglomerates (Hindalco): material 50-70%. Services-heavy: lower.

IT.source_note: Consolidated IT. Conglomerates with IT subsidiaries (Mahindra with Tech Mahindra) show higher ratios. Commodity-heavy: 0.5-1%. Diversified-services: 1.5-3%. Gartner CPG/Industrial IT 2024.

MARKETING.source_note: S&M across segments (weighted average). Consumer-facing segments (Reliance Retail, Aditya Birla Fashion): 5-10%. B2B/commodity segments: 0.5-2%.

FACILITIES.source_note: Group corporate HQ and business services overhead. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — conglomerate HQ overhead typically 0.5-1.5% of group revenue.

POWER_ENERGY.source_note: Energy costs across manufacturing operations. Energy-intensive conglomerates (Hindalco aluminium, UltraTech cement): 10-15%. Diversified: 3-6%. M&M FY25: ~3%.

PROF_SVCS.source_note: Group-level legal, audit, governance. SEBI LODR + BRSR Core compliance costs for top-1000 listed entities. INTERNAL_CALIBRATION.

BRSR_ESG.source_note: CSR (2% of PAT mandatory) + ESG assurance costs. M&M FY25: CSR spend ₹1,800 Cr. SEBI BRSR Core mandates third-party assurance for top-1000. Conglomerate scale means significant absolute CSR.
